title: How to get better performance in SRP

messages.content: # Getting bad performance specifcally in SRP? Follow this guide!

# Step 1
> Open Content manager and go to Settings > Custom shaders patch > General patch settings
# Step 2
> Scroll down until you see Chunks optimization and click on it. When the drop down menu appears select Advanced (experimental)
# Step 3
> Advanced chunk optimization may lead to issues on other maps so it is only recommended to be used on SRP
